name: hivemind-capture
description: Capture Codex decisions into HiveMind through the deterministic local CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Record Codex decisions with actor provenance.
interface.longDescription: Installs the hivemind-capture skill. The skill teaches Codex when to preserve a durable organizational decision and how to call the HiveMind decision.capture CLI against either a local or shared ledger.
defaultPrompt: Capture the selected option in HiveMind.
Query HiveMind for recent agent captures.
